overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player character moves from a street intersection up to an elevated pedestrian walkway featuring a massive colorful spiral LED structure overhead, then continues through narrow corridors and descends into a tunnel underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street intersection with crosswalk

events.description: turning left toward the stairs leading to elevated walkway
ascending stairs from street level to elevated pedestrian promenade

agents.ego_description: walking along the street corner then turning left to climb the stairs to the upper level

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection
dark colored car waiting at the traffic signal

entered.detail: large illuminated building sign displaying white number 05 against dark background
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing painted on street
tall industrial pole with traffic signals and speed limit display showing 40
wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading up to elevated walkway
massive cylindrical LED installation with rainbow colors visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city intersection at night, with wet reflective streets and neon signage. The camera holder walks along the sidewalk, turns left, and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the street below, and the iconic spiral LED structure becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian promenade with spiral LED canopy

events.description: arriving at top of stairs onto the elevated plaza walkway
slight rightward curve while walking along the promenade path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated promenade beneath the colorful spiral LED structure, passing benches and planters

entered.detail: illuminated orange seating with metallic frames lining the walkway
raised hexagonal planters containing spiky tropical vegetation
transparent safety barrier overlooking the street level below
tall buildings covered with glowing digital advertisements and billboards

segments.scene_description: Now on the elevated promenade, the camera moves beneath the massive rotating spiral LED structure that dominates the sky with rainbow colors. The path is lined with orange illuminated benches and tropical planters. The wet tiled floor reflects the neon lights from above, and tall buildings with holographic advertisements rise in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered walkway between high concrete walls

events.description: entering narrow corridor section between high concrete walls
passing through darker section of corridor with visible wall graffiti

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow corridor with walls on both sides, trash scattered on the ground

entered.detail: tall gray concrete walls with graffiti markings and weathered surfaces
smooth dark concrete barrier wall on the right side of the path
wall section covered with white spray-painted graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The wide promenade narrows into a confined corridor between tall concrete walls. The colorful spiral structure is still visible overhead but closer now. The walls feature graffiti and the ground is littered with scattered papers and trash. The atmosphere becomes more enclosed and urban-decay in aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza transitioning to tunnel underpass

events.description: exiting narrow corridor into open plaza area with tunnel entrance visible
descending ramp into the tunnel underpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward the tunnel entrance and descending into the underpass

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing near the tunnel entrance

entered.detail: dark underpass entrance framed with red neon accent lighting
descending concrete ramp leading down into the tunnel
horizontal red LED light strips lining the tunnel walls
horizontal red LED light strips on the right side of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into a plaza area with the tunnel entrance ahead. The massive spiral structure is visible in the background to the right. The camera approaches and enters the tunnel, descending a ramp lined with red neon strips. The environment transitions from the open neon-lit city to the darker, enclosed underpass with red ambient lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-lit city intersection into the depths of a dark, industrial underpass. It begins on a wet sidewalk where the camera turns and ascends a wide concrete staircase, leaving the passing futuristic traffic behind as a massive spiral LED structure emerges in the distance. As the camera reaches the elevated promenade, the environment opens up beneath the rainbow colors of the rotating spiral, moving past orange illuminated benches and holographic advertisements reflected on the tiled floor. The scene then shifts as the wide path narrows into a confined, graffiti-covered corridor filled with urban decay, before expanding briefly into a plaza. Finally, the camera turns away from the colorful skyline and descends a ramp into a tunnel, where the bright city lights are replaced by the oppressive glow of red neon strips.
